hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && cd /home/data/repos/github.com/streetrace-ai/streetrace && poetry run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && poetry run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
COMMAND=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty') && if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /home/data/repos/github.com/streetrace-ai/streetrace && make check; fi
